description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a single large spoked wheel on one side and two extended wooden handles for pushing or pulling. The cart features a flat wooden platform covered by a weathered, arched fabric canopy supported by wooden posts. On the platform, there are several colorful crates and baskets filled with produce such as green cabbages and other goods, suggesting its use as a market or street vendor cart. Additional crates are attached to the sides and underneath the main platform, maximizing storage space. The wood appears aged and rough, with visible grain and wear, while the canopy is a faded grayish fabric. Metal brackets and fasteners reinforce the structure, especially around the wheel and handle joints.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with a fabric canopy, large spoked wheel, and multiple crates of produce, designed for street vending.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large spoked wheel, extended handles, and the main platform with crates of produce under a fabric canopy.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the arrangement of crates and produce on the platform and the arched canopy structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying additional crates stored beneath the platform and the full width of the handcart.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the handles, wheel, and the back of the canopy, with crates visible on the side and undercarriage.
attribute_load_platform_design: flat wooden surface with attached crates
